item.title: Ozempic, Wegovy maker Novo Nordisk to expand weight loss jab testing on kids
item.description: Novo Nordisk plans to trial its blockbuster drug on overweight teenagers in the Pacific, reflecting a shift underway in global health towards drugs that suppress appetite.

item.title: Looksmaxxing: Brisbane duo Androgenic and Nocturnal Kent take 7NEWS inside the internet’s latest self-help fad
item.description: ‘I’m just improving myself. You know, is somebody who goes to work every day or seeking a job insecure as well?’

item.title: Astron at Quinns Rocks runs out of unleaded petrol after customer fills jerry cans with $500 worth of fuel
item.description: A fuel shop attendant says tougher fuel limits are needed after a customer filled jerry cans with hundreds of dollars worth of petrol, emptying the service station.

item.title: NRL great Luke Keary tips Manly to make early move on under-fire coach Anthony Seibold
item.description: ‘The way they finished last year, and having the whole off season to make changes ... has anything changed?’

item.title: Australian children could be prescribed weight loss drugs like Wegovy to combat obesity
item.description: The controversial move has divided experts.

item.title: Fremantle coach Justin Longmuir slammed for ‘nonsensical’ comment about Opening Round
item.description: ‘When are they going to stop whinging?’

item.title: Family ties: Walker, Cochrane, Cooney, Hodge among AFL links to stacked 2026 draft hopefuls
item.description: A current coach, Brownlow medallist, club CEO and dozens of famous footy names from all 18 clubs have ties to this year’s draft hopefuls.

item.title: Reality show producers spark backlash with request for unattractive people on sign at filming location
item.description: The production company behind the Bondi-based series has responded to the outcry over the placard.

item.title: Trainers Patrick and Michelle Payne mourn loss of truck driver Peter Butler and three horses after ‘awful’ accident
item.description: The stable offered their condolences to the family of the driver, while confirming a third horse died in the crash.

item.description: The Danish monarchs are on their first state visit to Australia since ascending the throne two years ago.

item.description: The moment was caught on camera as the men tried to paddle clear.

item.title: Sydney jeweller determined to show multiple sclerosis diagnosis isn’t a ‘death sentence’
item.description: The neurological disease affects young adults and, in Australia, affects three times more women than men.

item.title: Banksy’s identity exposed in bombshell investigation
item.description: Newly uncovered court records link the enigmatic Brit to a 2000 arrest in New York, offering the clearest evidence yet.

item.title: New South Wales and Western Australia draw in tense farewell for Sheffield Shield coaches
item.description: The Blues gave it a red-hot crack but narrowly ran out of time.

item.title: Queensland researchers investigate modern diet link to rising bowel cancer rates in young Australians
item.description: Bowel cancer is now Australia's deadliest cancer for people aged 25 to 54.

item.title: Coldplay kiss cam HR exec Kristin Cabot blasts Ryan Reynolds, Gwyneth Paltrow, calls Andy Byron dishonest
item.description: In a bombshell new interview with Oprah Winfrey, Kristin Cabot has called out her former boss Andy Byron, as well as Ryan Reynolds and Gwyneth Paltrow.

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor scandal: Ex-prince makes outrageous demands in latest move to Marsh Farm
item.description: As Charles moves to strip his brother of any of his previous luxuries, the disgraced former prince is kicking up a fuss.

item.description: The world No.1’s distinctive new ink has been spotted six weeks after lifting the trophy.

item.title: New WA coach Beau Casson lifts lid on explosive Cam Green report
item.description: An interview with the Australian Test star lasted just 20 seconds before he reportedly ‘stormed off in a huff’.

item.description: What can refinancing really do for you.

item.description: The blinkers will go on the leading contender as jockey Rachel King chases history.

item.description: Is it time to make the move to Australia's smallest state?

item.description: One moment he was keeping the beat, the next he tumbled into shark-infested waters but that wasn’t the worst bit.

item.description: The alert has been issued nationally for the popular vegan product.

item.description: The blockage of the Strait of Hormuz has led to fuel shortages and price rises globally.

item.description: That is the intention behind the newly built home Casa Terra.

item.description: Fans may have a double take when the Aussie No.1 next steps out on court.

item.description: The Pakistani airstrike has increased tensions as the countries engage in ‘open war’.

item.description: Labor is cruising toward a landslide while the Liberals brace for heavy losses.

item.description: Shocking CCTV shows smoke turning into an explosive dash fire in seconds.

item.description: The retired great has accused the young gun of giving up on Australia too easily, claiming it’s ‘better for him that he’s gone’.

item.description: The store is offering cheaper prices on everyday staples but there's a key difference that sets it apart.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: One Nation surge to second place rattles Liberals as Labor eyes historic South Australian landslide
item.description: Polling as high as 28 per cent, One Nation is surging, but a late scandal could test its momentum as voters head to the polls today.

item.title: Aussie champ Cameron McEvoy becomes fastest swimmer in history
item.description: ‘Doing 20.88 is unreal. It’s crazy.’

item.title: Rolls-Royce abandons plan to go EV-only, will continue making V12 engines
item.description: Rolls-Royce joins Opel and Vauxhall, amongst others, in dumping plans to become an electric-only brand.

item.title: Middle East War live updates: US President Donald Trump says war ‘militarily won’, calls NATO allies ‘cowards’ over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Sydney Roosters captain James Tedesco shreds own team after crushing loss to Penrith
item.description: ‘We have to have a good look at ourselves.’

item.title: Bridgestone Potenza Adrenalin RE005 released
item.description: A new range of Bridgestone Potenza Adrenalin performance tyres has been launched, with more than 50 sizes available for popular sports cars.

item.title: Voices grow for biodiesel use, but technology has moved on
item.description: Decades of government inaction on biofuels have left Australia vulnerable, yet there are green shoots of hope – if we act now.

item.title: 2026 Toyota Corolla Cross price and specs
item.description: It lives in the shadow of the hot-selling Toyota RAV4, but the recently refreshed Corolla Cross is better equipped than before and can be had in GR Sport trim.

item.title: NRL great Gorden Tallis erased from Brisbane Broncos history as feud gets personal
item.description: It has all become too much for the champion’s former club, and officials have taken action.

item.title: Adelaide mum speaks outside court after Munno Park Shopping Centre brawl
item.description: The woman has dropped a bombshell statement outside court as she faces assault charges.

item.title: Inside the intelligence world: Former FBI agent reveals how agencies react to conflicts like Iran
item.description: ‘In an event like this, the need for intelligence is critical.’

item.title: Adelaide star Ben Keays sparks AFL storm for instructing fan to hold ball during clash with Western Bulldogs
item.description: ‘Really hope I never see it again.’

item.title: Tropical Cyclone Narelle expected to intensify before making landfall over Northern Territory
item.description: Queensland residents have begun to assess the damage left from the category 4 storm.

item.title: Melbourne Storm star Cameron Munster frustrated by NRL’s changes to six-again rule
item.description: ‘I’m sure there’s a lot of other people in the game frustrated, but they probably won’t come out and say it.’

item.title: Teen charged with the alleged assault of 14 women exercising in Perth’s northern suburbs
item.description: The alleged attacks span weeks and multiple locations, with police boosting patrols as similar cases emerge elsewhere.

item.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer star Nicholas Brendon dies aged 54
item.description: The actor played Buffy’s best friend, Xander Harris, in the hit 90s TV show.

item.title: Carnage at the MCG as Tom Lynch, Toby Nankervis and Christian Petracca all suffer hamstring injuries
item.description: The triple blow puts the spotlight on the league’s new rules.

item.title: Teenagers arrested after allegedly ramming, setting fire to Tarneit ice cream shop
item.description: One of the boys was taken to hospital after being bitten by a police dog.

item.title: Alex de Minaur loses to old nemesis Stefanos Tsitsipas in Miami nightmare
item.description: The Aussie star was beaten by the world No.51 to continue his rollercoaster start to the year.

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: The shocking phone call that haunts friend when Alicia Little was killed by partner Charles Evans
item.description: ‘There was just this loud noise ... and the phone cut out.’

item.title: Superstar jockey James McDonald rides into history books with 130th Group 1 victory
item.description: The champion jockey went past idol Damien Oliver with the ‘special’ triumph.

item.title: South Australia election: Orange wave of One Nation candidates may fizzle as voters stick with the majors
item.description: ‘People didn’t realise, you’re not voting for Pauline Hanson.’

item.title: Fans flock to Hobart Oval as Tasmania Devils win inaugural VFL game
item.description: A sold-out crowd has witnessed Tasmania make a perfect start.

item.title: American police release arrest footage of singer Justin Timberlake after suspected of drunk driving
item.description: ‘Can you guys please just do me a favour because you loved Bye Bye Bye.’

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Former RAAF pilot John Blackburn explains how bad the Israel-Iran war fuel blockage could become
item.description: ‘If this continues, we’re not only losing fuel.’

item.title: South Australia election: The independents and minority parties that might just wiggle their way back into parliament
item.description: Independents and minority parties are shaping up as the wildcards of the election.
